title: Should You Buy Universal Health Services Stock At $133?
text: Universal Health Services stock (NYSE: UHS), a hospital and healthcare services provider, has seen a 2% rise this year, outperforming the broader S&P500 index, down 16%.

title: Universal Health Services (UHS) Up 18.5% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Universal Health Services (UHS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Universal Health Services: Attractive Even In Light Of Cost Concerns
text: Universal Health Services continues to grow its topline nicely, but bottom line results have been discouraging this year. This is problematic, but this doesn't mean the company isn't worth considering.

title: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. TO PRESENT AT TWO UPCOMING HEALTHCARE CONFERENCES
text: KING OF PRUSSIA, Pa. , Nov. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE: UHS) announced today that Steve Filton, Executive Vice President, and Chief Financial Officer will present at the following conferences: Thursday, November 10, 2022 at 11:00 a.m.
